title: 2 Laser Stocks to Watch in a Challenging Industry
text: The Zacks Laser Systems and Components industry participants like Lumentum (LITE) and IPG Photonics (IPGP) gain from solid demand for emerging applications like cloud computing, autonomous driving, IoT and 5G amid pandemic-induced supply chain disruptions.

title: IQE inks multi-year supply agreement with Lumentum Holdings
text: IQE PLC (AIM:IQE), the semiconductor wafers supplier, said it has signed a multi-year contract with existing client Lumentum, effective immediately. The Welsh company will supply epiwafers supporting 3D sensing, LiDAR for automotive, and optical networking applications to its long-term customer.
